utterances.speaker: Richard
utterances.text: Really ? ! Well , it is just like everyone else apartment . It is got rooms , walls , and ceilings .

utterances.speaker: Richard's Date
utterances.text: Well , I just wanted to see where you lived . Now , give me the tour .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh my God ! Oh my God !

emotion_cause.span: 3_I just wanted to see where you lived . Now , give me the tour .

utterances.speaker: Richard
utterances.text: Ah well , this is the living room .

utterances.speaker: Richard
utterances.text: All right . This is the kitchen .

utterances.speaker: Richard
utterances.text: The bedroom . Well it is pretty much your typical ... bedroom .

utterances.speaker: Richard's Date
utterances.text: We are still on this side of the door .

utterances.speaker: Richard's Date
utterances.text: Yeah , but I did not get to see it .

emotion_cause.span: 9_I did not get to see it .

utterances.speaker: Richard
utterances.text: Oh shoot ! Maybe next time . Thanks for a lovely evening .

utterances.speaker: Richard
utterances.text: Oh , that was the blind date that I told you about , she called and switched it to today .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Did you like her ? And I am just asking as a friend , because I am totally fine with this .
